description:
The August API provides programmatic access to legal document intelligence and research workflows.

Non-Obvious Insight: August isn't just a document search tool. It's a legal knowledge graph.
Every file, folder, and query is a signal about how a legal team structures, retrieves, and
generates work product — enabling compound insights no single API wrapper could produce.

tools.name: files_get-download-urls
tools.description: Generate presigned URLs for downloading one or more files. Required: doc_ids. Optional: project_id, ttl (default: 3600), use_pdf (default: false). Returns the new DownloadResponse.

params.name: project_id
params.description: Optional project scope for the download

params.name: use_pdf
params.description: Download as PDF instead of original format

tools.name: folders_contents_get-folder
tools.description: Returns the contents (files and subfolders) of a specific folder. Required: folder_id. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 100).

tools.name: folders_tree_get-folder
tools.description: Returns the full folder tree starting from a specific folder. Required: folder_id.

tools.name: global_search_search-global
tools.description: Full-text search across all accessible projects. Required: q. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 50). Returns the SearchResults.

tools.name: project_search_search-project
tools.description: Full-text search within a specific project's documents and files. Required: project_id, q. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 50). Returns the SearchResults.

tools.name: projects_list
tools.description: Returns all projects the authenticated user has access to.

tools.name: projects_members_list-project
tools.description: Returns all members of a specific project. Required: project_id.

tools.name: queries_submit-query
tools.description: Submit a legal research or document analysis query in Genius Mode. The query is processed asynchronously; poll status for completion. Required: query. Optional: file_ids, folder_ids, mode (default: research) (plus 1 more). Returns the new QuerySubmitResponse.

params.name: file_ids
params.description: File/document IDs to include in the query context

params.name: folder_ids
params.description: Folder IDs to scope the query to

params.name: project_id
params.description: Project ID to scope the query to

params.name: query
params.description: The natural language or structured query

tools.name: queries_files_get-query
tools.description: Retrieve files generated by a completed query. Required: query_id. Returns the QueryFiles.

tools.name: queries_result_get-query
tools.description: Retrieve the completed result of a processed query. Required: query_id. Returns the QueryResult.

tools.name: queries_status_get-query
tools.description: Poll the processing status of a submitted query. Required: query_id. Returns the QueryStatus.
